title: Eppie Belden
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MultipleIssues|citation|expand}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Eppie_profile.png]] |name=Eppie Belden |homeworld=[[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' |birth=[[128 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Bakuran]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners=[[Orn Belden]] |siblings= |children=[[Roviden Belden]] |affiliation=*[[Antruse family]] *[[Belden family]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You should judge that Jedi by what he does, not by rumors or morality tales.|Eppie Belden to Gaeriel Captison, about Jedi Knight Luke Skywalker|}} '''Eppie Belden''', maiden name '''Eppie Antruse''', was a [[Bakuran]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of the [[Antruse family]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. She joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. With her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], [[Orn Belden]], she had a [[Parent/Legends|son]] named [[Roviden Belden]]. After Roviden and Eppie both aided the Rebellion, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Wilek Nereus]] ordered her son's [[Death/Legends|execution]] and her mind destroyed using a parasitic insect from the [[Jospro sector/Legends|Jospro sector]], causing her to live in a state resembling advanced senility; Orn was also eventually killed. Belden was 132 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old by the time of the [[Bakura Incident]], during which the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to reverse her condition. Using her Bakuran underground contacts and her skills as a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]], she initiated the Bakuran Revolution and personally captured Nereus. ==Biography== {{Quote|Who are you, old woman?''"
"''Start guessing, youngster. I'm Orn Belden's revenge.''"
"''You can't be here, scarring of the neocortex is permanent.''"
"''Tell that to Commander Skywalker|Imperial Governor Wilek Nereus and Eppie Belden|}} Eppie Antruse was a [[Bakuran]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was born in [[128 BBY]] as a member of the [[Antruse family]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. In [[97 BBY]], the same [[Standard year/Legends|year]] as a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] uprising on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], she [[Marriage/Legends|married]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Orn Belden]] and changed her name to Eppie Belden. Sometime afterward, they had their only child, [[Roviden Belden|Roviden]]. [[File:Eppie_Belden.png|thumb|right|160px|Eppie Belden]] Along with her husband and son, Eppie sympathized with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Bakura was independent and neutral during the conflict until the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] annexed Bakura in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Roviden, who had become an agent of the Rebellion, was executed on order of Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Wilek Nereus]]; Eppie, who had also aided the Rebellion, was also ordered to be executed. Orn pleaded for her life, and Nereus agreed to grant it—but instead of killing her, Nereus destroyed her mind using a parasitic insect from the [[Jospro sector/Legends|Jospro sector]]. The price for Orn was the loss of his voice. Eppie's condition, which resembled advanced senility, was incurable until the [[Invasion of Bakura]], when [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to reverse the damage. She awoke to find that Nereus had killed her husband and arrested [[Prime Minister (Bakura)|Prime Minister]] [[Yeorg Captison]], and—using her contacts in the Bakuran underground and her skills as a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]]—initiated the Bakuran Revolution. Despite her age, she personally captured Nereus, and like other revolutionaries, was in favor of trying him in a revolutionary tribunal. However, with the surrender of the Imperial garrison and the release of Prime Minister Captison, the revolutionaries deferred authority back to the [[Bakuran Senate]] and handed Nereus over to Skywalker. ==Personality and traits== She had a personality that was described as "fiery," to match her hair, and was the first adult friend of [[Gaeriel Captison]]. ==Skills and abilities== Belden was skilled as a slicer. ==Appearances== *''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{FactFile|23|BAK 1-4|The Truce at Bakura}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|beldens|Belden, Eppie and Orn}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Eppie Belden }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Belden, Eppie}} [[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic members]] [[Category:Bakurans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Resistance fighters]] [[Category:Slicers]]
